description: Day of experiment post-wound, where D0 indicates the day of wounding
arbitrary alphabetical naming system used pre-genotype analysis
a coral was either wounded (yes) or control (no)
The purpose of a certain subset of corals was for either gene expression only (gene), physiology and gene (physio/gene), or microscope photography (photo)
PAM was done at 2 locations; at the top of the coral fragment nearest to the wound, and the bottom of the coral fragment approximately 1cm up from the end
F0 value (fluorescence yield) as read off of Diving PAM
Fm value (maximal fluorescence yield) as read off of Diving PAM
Yield value as read off of Diving PAM
Relative rate of electron transport as read off of Diving PAM
